name: Renee & Ashley Graves | A Chance Encounter
description:
It's very shrimple, you had invited Andrew to go to the beach but he couldn’t make it. Now it would be very cliche of me to say "So he sent his mother and sister in his place" come on guys I'm not that predictable. They overheard your loud ass on the phone :)
